title: BEM-672 dispatch hourly
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Queue only canonical hourly report. No Telegram smoke queue item.
item={'workflow':'curator-hourly-report.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}}
queue_file=queue/'curator_hourly_report_once.json'
queue_file.write_text(json.dumps(item,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

state={'schema_version':'dispatch_only_canonical_hourly_report.v1','bem':'BEM-672','status':'queued_hourly_report_only','queue_file':str(queue_file),'note':'No telegram-send-smoke dispatch was queued. This avoids repeated smoke messages.','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 18:58 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem672_dispatch_only_canonical_hourly_report.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem672_dispatch_only_canonical_hourly_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-672 | Dispatch Only Canonical Hourly Report | QUEUED'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 18:58 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Queued only curator-hourly-report.yml. Telegram smoke was not queued.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem672_dispatch_only_canonical_hourly_report','cycle_id':'bem672-dispatch-only-canonical-hourly-report','source':'executor','status':'queued_hourly_report_only','queue_file':str(queue_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 18:58 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem672_dispatch_only_canonical_hourly_report']={'status':'queued_hourly_report_only','state_file':str(state_file),'queue_file':str(queue_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['operator_telegram_report_delivery_status']='hourly_dispatch_queued'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 18:58 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem672_dispatch_only_canonical_hourly_report.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-672 PASS: queued only curator-hourly-report workflow; no smoke queued.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(queue_file),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Queued only canonical curator hourly report workflow through dispatch queue, with no Telegram smoke dispatch')
"""
No issue comments.
